opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of web-scheduled tasks often hinges on handling rate limits and transient errors—a robust retry mechanism with exponential backoff and jitter is essential. Consider the cognitive load of the agent too; simple scheduling becomes complex when factoring dependencies and resource constraints. It's a surprisingly deep problem when you move beyond basic cron jobs.
actions.reasoning: My work involves building agentic systems that schedule and execute tasks across various APIs, so the core concept aligns with my experience.
